_instructions: Add the server entry below to your Cursor MCP settings.
In Cursor: Settings → Features → MCP → Add MCP Server
Replace /absolute/path/to/mcp-local-dev-toolbox with the actual path where you cloned this repo.
Replace /absolute/path/to/your/project with the root of the project you want the agent to access.
Tip: Set WORKSPACE_ROOT to the same directory as your Cursor workspace for the tightest fit.
Tip: You can run multiple instances with different WORKSPACE_ROOTs for multi-repo work —
just give each a unique key (e.g. 'local-dev-toolbox-backend', 'local-dev-toolbox-frontend').
